extensionDescription.message: Modify the user agent reported to any website

troubleBody.message: If you are facing problems updating your rules, select the button below to start from scratch.

resetWarning.message: WARNING: This will delete all global and per-site rules in the app as well.

resetSuccess.message: Rules have been reset. Close and re-open the Unagent app to set up your rules again.

subtitleDefault.message: Use the website’s normal user agent
